GameTankEmulator core sources vendored from:
  repo:   https://github.com/clydeshaffer/GameTankEmulator
  commit: e7e25e2daf5da5d041ae8dc48f740a362c1e66ff
  date:   2026-06-03 22:17:17 -0400
  license: MIT (Copyright 2020 Clyde Shaffer)

Vendored (reusable hardware emulation units only):
  mos6502/  blitter  audio_coprocessor  palette  timekeeper
  system_state  emulator_config  game_config  gametank_palette

NOT vendored (standalone-app shell the libretro core replaces):
  gte.cpp (SDL window + main loop), imgui/, devtools/, tinyfd/,
  whereami/, ui/, font.cpp, joystick_*  -- see src/libretro.cpp instead

LOCAL DELTAS from upstream (re-apply after an update-vendor.sh --apply):
  - mos6502/mos6502.h : added marked LIBRETRO accessors for the private IRQ state
      (LR_GetIrqTimer / LR_GetIrqLine / LR_SetIrqState) so save states can
      capture/restore irq_timer + irq_line. update-vendor.sh flags this file as
      differing -- that is EXPECTED; merge the accessors back, don't blind-overwrite.
  - SDL_inc.h : routes to vendor/sdl_shim.h under LIBRETRO_BUILD. It is NOT pulled
      by update-vendor.sh (it's our file, not an upstream copy).

To re-pull these files from the pinned commit (reproducible, with a diff):
  scripts/update-vendor.sh            # dry-run, shows what differs
  scripts/update-vendor.sh --apply    # overwrite vendor/ from the pin
The file manifest + commit pin live in scripts/update-vendor.sh.
